creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Joe hasn't responded on another PR, he seems to be away.
Unfortunately I've not had good luck with Joe's PR's, they always seem to have some problem poudriere would have caught.  However, there is only 2 weeks left for staging so I will move this to patch-ready.

I consider this "take at your own risk" until some poudriere logs are provided.
